programme.title: Komisārs Reksis
programme.desc: Pie skatītājiem atgriežas visā pasaulē iemīļotais četrkājainais pēddzinis Reksis (kura dižciltīgais vārds, starp citu, ir Redžinalds fon Ravenhorsts)! Kopā ar savu labāko divkājaino draugu, izmeklētāju Rihardu Mozeru, viņi ķer ļaundarus un atrisina dažādus noziegumus.

programme.title: Jā, ministra kungs!
programme.desc: Ministrs ir šokā, uzzinot, ka laikā, kad bijis opozīcijā, viņš tika stingri uzraudzīts. Viņš atklāj, ka viņa nodaļa ir atbildīga par valdības novērošanas aprīkojuma iegādi, un pavēl to izbeigt. Ministrs nopludina savu viedokli presei, un viņa nostāja rada ievērojamu sabiedrības atbalstu. Tomēr viņš pārdomā, saprotot, ka viņam draud nāves briesmas.

programme.title: Jā, ministra kungs!
programme.desc: Eplbiju uzrunā Britu Ķīmijas korporācijas vadītājs, lai iegūtu ministra atbalstu propanola jeb metadikosīna ražošanai. Lai gan ķīmiskā viela ir nekaitīga, "BCC" pauž bažas, ka vārds "dioksīns" raisīs nepamatotas bažas sabiedrībā. Eplbijs pārliecina ministru, ka nav par ko uztraukties. Kad sāk pieaugt protesti pret ķīmisko vielu līgumu, Hakeram ir jārīkojas ātri.

programme.title: Jā, ministra kungs!
programme.desc: Ministrs un sers Hamfrijs spriež par Apvienotās Karalistes ieguvumiem Eiropas Kopienā. Hakers negatīvi vērtē Briseles iejaukšanos. Hamfrijs nepiekrīt un norāda, ka Apvienotās Karalistes dalībai ir daudz priekšrocību. Tomēr viedokļi mainās, kad tiek padzirdētas baumas, ka Hakeram var tikt piedāvāts augsts amats Briselē.

programme.title: Jā, ministra kungs!
programme.desc: Ministrs ir noraizējies par vispārējo dzīves kvalitāti un nevēlas apstiprināt sešstāvu piebūvi jaunajai daudzstāvu biroju ēkai, ko ierosinājis baņķieris sers Dezmonds. Problēmas tomēr rodas, kad pilsētas saimniecībai, kuru bieži apmeklē skolēni, tiek anulēts nomas līgums. Varbūt sers Dezmonds var palīdzēt ministram, piešķirot kādu zemes gabalu? Nav nekāds pārsteigums, ka sers Hamfrijs savā labā ir manipulējis ar visu šo situāciju.

programme.title: Jā, ministra kungs!
programme.desc: Ministram un seram Hamfrijam ir jāierodas komisijā, kas izskata valdības naudas šķērdēšanu. Sers Hamfrijs ierosina vairākus veidus, kā ministrs var izvairīties no sarežģītiem jautājumiem, taču Hakeru pārsteidz deputāte, kuras rīcībā ir ziņojumi, kuros pieminēta naudas šķērdēšana viņa nodaļā. Kad Hakers tiek izsaukts uz sapulci, viņš saprot, ka ir tikai viens risinājums.

programme.title: Cilvēku tirgotāja sieva
programme.desc: Dokumentālās filmas otrajā daļā turpinām sekot Amandas ceļam caur sāpēm, atklāsmēm un iekšējām pārmaiņām pēc vīra apcietināšanas par cilvēku tirdzniecību. Filmā dziļāk pētīts, kā Amanda tiek spiesta pārskatīt savas vērtības un attiecības, cenšoties atgūt kontroli pār savu dzīvi. Pamazām atklājas tas, kā viņas centieni saglabāt ģimeni izrādījās vērsti pret viņas emocionālo veselību un bērnu labklājību, kā arī cik grūti ir atšķirt mīlestību no destruktīvas atkarības. Filmas otrā daļa arī liek domāt par plašāku cilvēku tirdzniecības problēmu sabiedrībā — par manipulācijām un noziegumiem, kuri ietekmē ne tikai tiešos upurus, bet arī viņu ģimenes locekļus un sabiedrību kopumā.

programme.title: Midsomeras slepkavības
programme.desc: Detektīvs Toms Bārnabijs ir pacietīgs un metodisks izmeklētājs. Viņš saprot, ka noziegumiem mazā pilsētiņā vienmēr būs sociāls raksturs, tamdēļ svarīgi izprast tās iedzīvotāju attiecības. Tikai un vienīgi viņš spēj pamanīt neskaidrus mājienus un sadzīt pēdas viltīgam slepkavam brīdī, kad nupat, šķiet, tas izbēgs nesodīts. Kad Toms Bārnabijs atgriežas mājās, viņš ir mīlošs vīrs un tēvs, tomēr, neskatoties uz to, detektīvs viņā nekad nesnauž. Citreiz vistrāpīgākās atklāsmes rodas tieši pie brokastu galda! Seriāls "Midsomeras slepkavības" ieturēts vislabākajās britu klasiskā detektīva tradīcijās: virkne aizdomās turamo, sajauktas pēdas, mīklaini mājieni, neizprotami motīvi un iespēja skatītājam pašam minēt, kurš šoreiz būs vainīgais. Seriāls veiksmīgi izrādīts teju visās Eiropas valstīs, kā arī ASV, Kanādā, Dienvidāfrikā un Tuvajos Austrumos, kopumā tas tiek uzņemts jau vairāk nekā 25 gadus.

programme.title: Noziegumi Amalfi piekrastē
programme.desc: Amalfi, Itālija. Starp saulē mirdzošām klintīm un tirkīza viļņiem Daniels De Luka, bijušais jūras kājnieks ar noslēpumainu pagātni, strādā greznajā viesnīcā "Kostjēra", risinot viesu problēmas un untumus. Kad kādu nakti viesnīcas īpašnieka jaunākā meita Aliče pazūd bez vēsts, Daniels un viņa uzticamie pavadoņi seko pavedieniem, kas atklāj tumšu noslēpumu tīklu aiz glancētajām viesnīcas fasādēm un bagāto klientu kaprīzēm. Katrs pavediens ved viņus dziļāk intrigās un atklāj, ka pat visskaistākajā piekrastē nekas nav tā, kā tas izskatās.

programme.title: Melnais saraksts
programme.desc: Kritiķu un skatītāju iemīļots kriminālseriāls. Tā darbība sākas dienā, kad darbu FIB galvenajā birojā Vašingtonā uzsāk jauna profilētāja Elizabete Kīna. Tajā pašā rītā tur ierodas viens no FIB meklētākajiem noziedzniekiem, Reimonds "Reds" Redingtons, un labprātīgi ļauj sevi notvert. Reds palīdz FIB sagūstīt citu bīstamu noziedznieku un novērst uzbrukumu civiliedzīvotājiem. Viņš paziņo, ka viņam esot vesels saraksts un informācija par tādiem noziedzniekiem un teroristiem, par kuru esamību FIB pat nenojauš. Reds ir gatavs sadarboties ar vienu savādu noteikumu – viņš runās tikai ar Elizabeti. Tā sākas īpašas attiecības, kuru īstā daba un iemesls ir zināmi tikai Redingtonam. Lai gan pamatā seriāla darbība norit ASV, tas aizved arī uz dažādām eksotiskām vietām visā pasaulē un ļauj ieskatīties kriminālajā pasaulē. Dažādiem apbalvojumiem vairāku gadu laikā izvirzīti seriāla specefektu veidotāji, kaskadieri un muzikālais noformējums.

programme.title: Literatūre
programme.desc: "Literatūre" ir literārā tūrisma dokumentāls raidījumu cikls, kas apskata latviešu literatūru no sendienām līdz mūsdienām. Katrā epizodē kāds latviešu rakstnieks kā ceļa karti ņem kādu sev tuva aizgājušo laiku autora grāmatu un kopā ar literatūristi Martu dodas ceļojumā uz vietām, kur tas dzīvojis vai par kurām rakstījis. Savukārt, viņu savrupais ceļabiedrs Gustavs ceļo atsevišķi ar grāmatām un meklē, kam palasīt priekšā.

programme.title: Literatūre
programme.desc: "Literatūre" ir literārā tūrisma dokumentāls raidījumu cikls, kas apskata latviešu literatūru no sendienām līdz mūsdienām. Katrā epizodē kāds latviešu rakstnieks kā ceļa karti ņem kādu sev tuva aizgājušo laiku autora grāmatu un kopā ar literatūristi Martu dodas ceļojumā uz vietām, kur tas dzīvojis vai par kurām rakstījis. Savukārt, viņu savrupais ceļabiedrs Gustavs ceļo atsevišķi ar grāmatām un meklē, kam palasīt priekšā.

programme.title: Vides fakti
programme.desc: Raidījums par norisēm dabā un apkārtējā vidē. "Vides fakti" sniedz informāciju par sezonālām norisēm dabā un dzīvnieku pasaulē, par vides aktualitātēm, par videi draudzīgu dzīvesveidu, par aktuālām cilvēka un vides attiecībām ārpus Latvijas robežām. Raidījumā "Vides fakti" ir skatāmi arī piedzīvojumu sižeti par aktīvā tūrisma iespējām Latvijā, kā arī īsfilmas par neparastiem ceļojumiem pasaulē.

programme.title: Kultūrdeva
programme.desc: Raidījumā "Kultūrdeva" viesosies aktieris un režisors Mārtiņš Meiers, kurš Dailes teātrī uzvedis izrādi bērniem "Runcis zābakos", kā arī Latvijas Spēļu izstrādātāju asociācijas valdes priekšsēdētāja Madara Āboliņa un Ekonomikas un kultūras augstskolas datorspēļu dizaina pasniedzējs Aleksandrs Priedītis.

programme.title: Lielās patiesības
programme.desc: Dizainere Baiba Ladiga-Kobajaši un arhitekts Reidži Kobajaši ir pāris, kuri apvieno dažādus jaņ un iņ aspektus. Arī - latvisko un japānisko. Pēc vairākiem Šanhajā pavadītiem gadiem Baiba un Reidži ir pārcēlušies uz dzīvi Latvijā. Sarunā ar raidījuma vadītāju Ilmāru Latkovski - par to, kā skatījumu uz dzīvi un vērtībām ietekmē gan daudzmiljonu lielās pilsētas, gan salīdzinoši mierīgā dzīve Latvijā, par saistību starp latvisko un japānisko. Pārbaudīsim arī dažas atziņas par Japānu, kas izteiktas E. I. Siliņa eseju grāmatā "Lielo patiesību meklējumi".

programme.title: Daudz laimes, jubilār!
programme.desc: Zinātniece, filozofijas doktore un profesore ar starptautisku pieredzi, lielo patiesību meklētāja, divu dēlu mamma un vecmāmiņa sešiem mazbērniem, savulaik izvirzīta Valsts prezidentes amatam! Lūk, tik īpaša ir šīs reizes raidījuma "Daudz laimes, jubilār!" viešņa Maija Kūle Profesore, pati dzimusi un bērnību pavadījusi Lejasciema dabas krāšņumā, saka, ka esam aizmirsuši tradīciju iet dabā, vērīgi skatīties un pamanīt skaisto, kas veido "ētikā balstītu asredzību" - pamatu spējai atšķirt patieso no patērētāju kultūras pseido vērtībām, kas balstās uz pārlieku paštīksmināšanos. Kūles kundze uzrāda tendences, taču nedramatizē notikumus. Saruna ar viņu allaž ir humora pilna, sadzīviskos notikumos balstīta. Profesore piezīmē, ka ikdiena, kaut arī mēdz sagādāt mums rūpes un raizes, tomēr ir skatāma arī caur ironijas un humora prizmu: "Mēs pārāk maz esam gatavi paciest dzīves pašsaprotamās grūtības, paskatīties no mazliet tālāka rakursa, nesūdzēties un nekritizēt. Dzīve bez ikdienas grūtībām un nejēdzībām taču nemēdz būt - nekad tā nav bijis un diez vai būs." Raidījums priecē gan ar atvērtu sarunu, gan ar amizantiem ceļojumu un ģimenes pieredzes stāstiem, kas iedvesmo jaunam, mīlošam skatam uz lietām, kas mūs visus vieno.

programme.title: V.I.P. - Veiksme. Intuīcija. Prāts
programme.desc: Pirms diviem mēnešiem noslēdzās 26. ziemas olimpiskās spēles, ko tālāk? Tagad ar nepacietību gaidām vasaras sporta parādi Losandželosā 2028. gadā, kurā, visticamāk, piedalīsies kāds no Uģa Joksta šī vakara viesiem. Komandu kapteiņi: Dāvis Skreivers un Aleksandrs Samoilovs. Dāvis Skreivers - komandas kapteinis, basketbolists. Studējis Latvijas Universitātē Komunikācijas zinātni, bijis augstskolas komandas spēlētājs. Reiz ieguvis duālās karjeras stipendiju par augstiem sasniegumiem sportā -⁠⁠ bijis U18 basketbola izlases spēlētājs un 3x3 U21 izlases spēlētājs. Pērn piedalījās Ķīnā notiekošajā Pasaules kausa izcīņā 3x3 basketbolā U23 vienībām. Toreiz mediji ziņoja, ka Skreivera uzņēmība ļāva latviešiem pieveikt amerikāņus. Francis Lācis - basketbolists, spēlē spēka uzbrucēja pozīcijā. Pēdējos gados pilnībā pievērsies 3x3 basketbolam, spēlējis ASV koledžu un universitāšu sporta klubos, arī Nīderlandē. Bija Latvijas 3x3 basketbola komandas spēlētājs olimpiskajā turnīrā Parīzē. 2025. gadā pārstāvēja Latvijas-Igaunijas basketbola līgas un Latvijas basketbola līgas klubu "Rīgas Zeļļi". Nauris Miezis - basketbolists, startē 3x3 basketbola disciplīnā. Olimpiskās zelta medaļas ieguvējs 2020. gada vasaras olimpiskajās spēlēs Tokijā. Pēdējā laikā profesionālo karjeru saistījis ar Ķīnu un Mongoliju. Bez olimpiskā zelta ir arī zelts un trīs sudrabi Eiropas kausā, sudrabs un bronza Pasaules kausā. Nauris ir arī erudīcijas spēļu veterāns un ģeogrāfijas zinātājs. Aleksandrs Samoilovs - komandas kapteinis. Izglītības un zinātnes ministrijas Sporta departamenta vadītājs, pludmales volejbolists un treneris. Ar iesauku "Karalis Lauva" ("Lion King") ilgstoši bijis līderis Latvijas pludmales volejbolā, 15 gadus startējis pasaules augstākā līmeņa sacensībās. Karjeras laikā viņš spēlējis kopā ar tādiem Latvijas sportistiem kā Jānis Šmēdiņš un Mārtiņš Pļaviņš - abi ir olimpisko medaļu ieguvēji. Kristians Fokerots - pludmales volejbolists. Viens no talantīgākajiem un perspektīvākajiem jaunās paaudzes Latvijas pludmales volejbolistiem. 2024. gadā 19 gadu vecumā kļuva par Eiropas čempionu pārī ar Mārtiņu Plaviņu, savukārt, 2025. gadā pārī ar Gustavu Auziņu kļuva par pasaules čempioniem vecuma grupā līdz 21 gadam. Līva Ēbere - šobrīd Komercskolas skolniece, pludmales volejboliste, Mārtiņa Pļaviņa audzēkne. Volejbola laukumā izceļas ar cīņassparu un labu aizsardzību, personiskās kvalitātēs dominē liela mērķtiecība. Izcīnījusi godalgotas vietas 2024. gada Eiropas čempionātā U22. 2025. gadā pārstāvējusi Latviju gan Eiropas, gan pasaules čempionātos, guvusi augstus rezultātus.

programme.title: Pasaules panorāma
programme.desc: Globālo ziņu laikmetā notikums Āzijā vai Amerikas kontinentā jau rīt var mainīt dzīvi Eiropā, bet lēmums, kas pieņemts Rīgā – atbalsoties visā pasaulē. "Pasaules panorāma" piedāvā neatkarīgas un uzticamas ziņas, atspoguļojot un analizējot ārpolitikas aktualitātes, kā arī sarunas ar politologiem, ārpolitikas ekspertiem, pasaulē pazīstamām personībām par svarīgāko Baltijā un Ziemeļvalstīs, citviet Eiropā, kā arī visā pasaulē. Raidījumu vada LTV Ziņu dienesta ārzemju ziņu redaktori Toms Pastors un Ina Strazdiņa.

programme.title: 1000 jūdzes Albānijā
programme.desc: Tā ir viena no noslēpumainākajām Balkānu valstīm, kas ilgu laiku bijusi izolēta no visas pasaules. Tāpēc ceļā uz Albāniju devusies nu jau devītā 1000 jūdžu ekspedīcija.

programme.title: 1000 jūdzes Albānijā
programme.desc: Tā ir viena no noslēpumainākajām Balkānu valstīm, kas ilgu laiku bijusi izolēta no visas pasaules. Tāpēc ceļā uz Albāniju devusies nu jau devītā 1000 jūdžu ekspedīcija.

programme.title: Globalizācijas un mēs
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls.

programme.title: Ražots Vācijā
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls.

programme.title: Ielas garumā
programme.desc: Pagājuši vairāk nekā 10 gadi, kopš Cēsīs uzfilmējām četrus raidījumus "Ielas garumā". Pa šo laiku Cēsu vecpilsēta piedzīvojusi lielas pārmaiņas, un īpašu prieku rada to namu atdzimšana, kas gadiem ilgi bija pamesti un lēni bruka kopā. Lielajā Katrīnas ielā, kur Andrejs Pumpurs uzrakstīja eposu "Lāčplēsis", tagad veidojas Pumpura kvartāls ar Spīdalas namu un Laimdotas namu. Rožu laukumā top Konrāda kvartāls, kura centrālo mūra namu vairākas cēsnieku paaudzes redzējušas tikai pussagruvušu, bet nu tam dota jauna dzīve, gluži tāpat kā koka arhitektūras pērlītei Mācītājmājai. Visvairāk šķēpu lauzts par jaunbūvi - Draugu namu, bet, kā zināms, tikai strīdos dzimst patiesība.

programme.title: Ielas garumā
programme.desc: Brauciens uz Dagdu ir gluži kā kāpiens kalnos, jo pilsēta atrodas 170–190 metru virs jūras līmeņa. Pāri Dagdas ezera spogulim pirmos ieraugām Vissvētās Trīsvienības Romas katoļu baznīcas torņus. Viens no skaistākajiem Latgales dievnamiem vēsturiski saistīts ar vietējiem muižniekiem fon Hilzeniem un Buiņickiem, kas veidojuši Dagdu par kultūras centru. Gleznainā vieta ar Dagdas ezeru un Narūtas un Guščas upēm stipri postīta karos un vairākas reizes degusi, bet allaž, gluži kā mitoloģiskais putns Fēnikss pilsētas ģerbonī, atdzimusi no pelniem. Šovasar Dagdas vēsturē pāršķirta jauna lappuse - tur notika pirmais Dagdas arhitektūras, mākslas un mūzikas festivāls.

programme.title: Tutas Lietas
programme.desc: Cik rokai ir pirkstu? Kā pagatavot kūku no smiltīm? Un kā skan bungas? Izzinot sevi un pasauli, bērniem ir daudz jautājumu. "Tutas lietas" ir video stāstu sērija bērniem vecumā no viena līdz pieciem gadiem, ko žurnāliste un raidījumu vadītāja Marta Selecka radījusi kopā ar domubiedriem – mazu bērnu vecākiem no kino un TV profesionāļu vides. Raidījuma būtība – tas ir mīļš un izglītojošs ekrāna saturs pašiem mazākajiem, viņiem saprotamā valodā par interesantām un noderīgām tēmām. Raidījuma galvenā varone ir jaukā meitene, bērnu draudzene Tuta. Viņas lomā iejutusies aktrise un mamma Liene Sebre. Tuta mazajiem jautru rotaļu veidā māca pašus pirmos vārdus, krāsas, dziesmiņas un skaitļus. Kopā ar Tutu jaunas lietas bērniem apgūt palīdz arī draudzīgā un ziņkārīgā Lapsa. "Tutas lietu" stāstiņu kopējo konceptu veidojusi Marta Selecka, bet scenārijus sagatavojusi jaunā, talantīgā bērnu autore Inga Mastiņa. Bērniem saistošu radošu vizuālo noskaņu radījusi pieredzējusī dizainere Ilze Žūriņa-Šeibaka, bet Tutas dziesmas mūzikas autore un izpildītāja ir dziedātāja un komponiste Laura Polence. Tutas piedzīvojumus iemūžinājis operators Dāvis Doršs, bet projekta režiju un montāžu veidojusi Andra Doršs, kura par savu darbu Latvijas kino projektos ieguvusi arī Nacionālo kino balvu "Lielais Kristaps".

programme.title: Tutas Lietas
programme.desc: Cik rokai ir pirkstu? Kā pagatavot kūku no smiltīm? Un kā skan bungas? Izzinot sevi un pasauli, bērniem ir daudz jautājumu. programme.title: Mazi Buzi Bums
programme.desc: Iepazīstieties, šis ir Buzis! Viņam ļoti patīk lasīt, bet vēl vairāk viņam patīk skatīties lielo bilžu grāmatu kopā ar savu mazo draugu. Tikai nez kur šodien paslēpies viņa draugs? Re, te viņš ir! Viņš paslēpies Buža kabatā. Opā! Tas taču ir Āpsītis! Āpsīti jūs noteikti jau pazīstat no raidījuma "Tutas lietas". Nu mazais Āpsītis ir nedaudz paaudzies un ar Buža palīdzību gatavs caur spēlēm, uzdevumiem, rotaļām un dziesmām iepazīt visdažādākās lietas. Pētīt balonus, kaķus, suņus, vistas, krūzes, bumbas, lietu, zirgus, kokus, traktorus, ābolus un cimdus aicināti arī mazie skatītāji pie TV ekrāniem. Bums!

programme.title: Province
programme.desc: Jura Pumpiņa dzimtā puse ir Balgale. Taču viņam nebija lemts tur uzaugt, jo viņš bija bērns vienā no tām ģimenēm, kuras izsūtīja 1949. gadā. Pēc atgriešanās viņiem vairs nebija savu tēva māju, jo tur jau dzīvoja sveši ļaudis, kolhoznieki. No Sibīrijas Jurim palika krievu valoda, jo latviešu mēle bija jāmācās gandrīz no jauna, un runas defekts - vecāko brāli bērnībā izsūtījumā sabadīja bullis, viņš sāka raustīt valodu, un Jurim, brāli atdarinot, tas pielipa. Sešdesmitajos un septiņdesmitajos gados Juris no darbiem brīvajā laikā iesaistījās leģendārajā "Rīgas pantomīmā", piedzīvojot šī amatierkolektīva ziedu laikus. Un deviņdesmito sākumā tēva mājas beidzot tika atgūtas. Juris joprojām nav pārdevis ne pēdu savas senču zemes - nepārdot ir viņa goda lieta. Tāpat kā goda lieta ir arī būt par zvaniķi Balgales baznīcā un par tiesnesi novusa mačos.

programme.title: Gudrs, vēl gudrāks
programme.desc: Grāmatas ir kā mazi burvji - tās atver durvis uz citu pasauli! Spēlē "Gudrs, vēl gudrāks" vērsim vaļā grāmatu, kuru lasīsim kopā ar 5. klašu pirmā pusfināla skolēniem. Lūk, divpadsmit dalībnieki: Lelde Lēna Vēja (Salaspils 1. vidusskola) , Veronika Šime (Dārzciema vidusskola), Pēteris Kotāns (Pamatskola "Rīdze"), Emma Karlsberga (Ādažu vidusskola), Līva Vaiteika (Nīcas vidusskola), Katrīna Jēkabsone (Saldus vidusskola), Herberts Vecpūlis (Jelgavas 4. sākumskola), Rebeka Grodņa (Rīgas Bolderājas Jaunā pamatskola), Ralfs Spēlmanis (Amatas pamatskola), Kate Āboliņa (Valmieras sākumskola), Ēriks Stramkals (Rīgas Mežciema pamatskola), Estere Runče (Berģu Mūzikas un mākslas pamatskola). Muzikāls pārsteigums no grupas "Carnival Youth" un ft. Juliannas - dziesma "Mīnas".

programme.title: Kultūrdeva
programme.desc: Raidījumā "Kultūrdeva" viesosies aktieris un režisors Mārtiņš Meiers, kurš Dailes teātrī uzvedis izrādi bērniem "Runcis zābakos", kā arī Latvijas Spēļu izstrādātāju asociācijas valdes priekšsēdētāja Madara Āboliņa un Ekonomikas un kultūras augstskolas datorspēļu dizaina pasniedzējs Aleksandrs Priedītis.

programme.title: Aculiecinieks
programme.desc: 13 minūšu gari televīzijas stāsti vēsta par notikumiem un Latvijā īpašiem cilvēkiem, aptverot vēsturiskus, zinātnes, izglītības, pilsētas, lauku un daudzus citus tematus.

programme.title: Inspektors Lūiss
programme.desc: Lūiss apmeklē fantāzijas rakstnieka Doriana Kreina jaunākā romāna atvēršanu, lai sagādātu meitai dzimšanas dienā grāmatu ar autogrāfu. Tikmēr upes krastā atrasts jaunas sievietes līķis; čehiete Marina Hārtnere guļ nogalināta starp spoguļstikla lauskām, un viņai blakus atrodas lapiņa, uz kuras ar asinīm rakstīts vārds "Ukbara". Hatavejs spriež, ka uzbrukuma ierocis sašķīdis slepkavības brīdī, un jau drīz tiek atrasts sena persiešu spoguļa rāmis. 16. gadsimta objekts pieder Oksfordas universitātes profesoram Hemidam Hasinam; tāds pats spogulis minēts Kreina jaunākajā romānā. Nozieguma šķetināšanā izmeklētājiem nākas pielietot zināšanas pasaules literatūrā.

programme.title: Inspektors Lūiss
programme.desc: Oksfordas universitātes studenti uzved "Venēcijas tirgotāju". Publiska mēģinājuma laikā viens no aktieriem tiek atrasts nodurts. Ironiskā kārtā augļotāja Šeiloka lomas izpildītājs bijis parādā naudu teju visiem izrādes dalībniekiem, un Lūiss ar Hataveju nespēj vien izsekot sarežģītajām kaislībām aizdomās turamo starpā. Hatavejs aiztur kādu krāpnieku, kura lietas izmeklēšanā noskaidrojas Lūisam svarīga informācija. Seržants vēlas izstāstīt inspektoram patiesību, taču satraucas, kā privātās ziņas ietekmēs abu draudzību. Tiek nogalināta bijusī Oksfordas studente, žurnāliste, kas uzodusi pēdas kādam lielam stāstam. Meklējot vainīgo, Lūisam nākas dzirdēt ne mazumu slavenu dramaturgu citātu.

programme.title: Inspektors Lūiss
programme.desc: Lūiss un Hatavejs izmeklē jauna vīrieša slepkavību. Pie nogalinātā atrodas pastkarte ar Paolo Učello medību ainavu un vārdiem "Tas nebija sapnis" otrā pusē. Upuris ir Stīvens Malens, kurš nesen bijis apcietināts, pēc tam, kad centies kādu notriekt ar automašīnu. Lūiss atklāj, ka Malens vēlējies uzbrukt pazīstamam baznīcas kritizētājam Tomam Ratenberijam, taču notriecis viņa meitu Džesiku, kura vēl joprojām nav atkopusies pēc savainojumiem. Pastkarte vedina izmeklētājus domāt, ka šajā lietā iesaistītas spēcīgas jūtas, un notikumu gaitā atklājas savādas saistības starp mīlestību un nāvi.

programme.title: Inspektors Lūiss
programme.desc: Atsaucoties vikāra sūdzībām par medību trokšņiem dievkalpojuma laikā, Lūiss un Hatavejs ierodas rokzvaigznes Ričija Magvaira savrupnamā. Magvairs un viņa biedri ir Lūisa jaunības elki, kas nav kopīgi muzicējuši jau vairāk nekā trīsdesmit gadus, - kopš bojā aizgāja grupas soliste Esmija. Taču izmeklētāji kļūst par lieciniekiem neparastam pavērsienam - mūziķe ir atgriezusies no mirušajiem. Neilgi pēc tam mežā tiek atrasts nogalināts bārenis. Uz mirušā zēna ķermeņa ir krāsas paliekas, un Lūiss atceras iebuktētos Magvaira savrupmājas vārtiņus. Kāda saistība vieno mirušo puisi un ekstravagantās rokzvaigznes?

programme.title: Inspektors Lūiss
programme.desc: Tūrisma autobusā atrasts miris doktors Stīvens Bleks - šī nebūtu pirmā reize, kad vecāks kungs gājis bojā no sirdstriekas publiskā vietā, taču šis nav tas gadījums. Vadītājs neatceras kunga iekāpšanu autobusā, un arī citi pasažieri mirušo nav ievērojuši. Lūiss dodas uz mirušā māju, kur automātiskajā atbildētājā atrod ziņu no Frānsisas Vudmilas. Hatavejs liecina Zelinska lietā, kas saistīta ar desmitgadīgas meitenes nogalināšanu, un šķiet, ka šī prāva uz seržantu atstāj smagas psiholoģiskas sekas. Izmeklēšana Lūisu un Hataveju aizved uz Krēvkoru, kur tiek atrasts vēl viens mirušais. Taču šķiet, ka Hatavejs nemaz nedomā par izmeklēšanu, tikai apbrīno savu seno draudzeni Skārletu.

programme.title: Aizliegtais paņēmiens
programme.desc: Lai uzzinātu par kāda notikuma patiesajiem apstākļiem vai iesaistīto personu nodomiem, raidījuma "Aizliegtais paņēmiens" komanda informācijas iegūšanai izmanto visdažādākos izmeklējošās žurnālistikas paņēmienus un žanrus – eksperimentus, testus, provokācijas, padziļinātus pētījumus, arī anonīmas intervijas. Žurnālisti padziļināti pēta un skatītājiem atklāj sociālpolitiskus tematus, kas ne vienmēr tiek izcelti citos medijos. Raidījums atklāj un atmasko, atsevišķos gadījumos sauc pie atbildības iesaistītās personas, norāda uz likumu nepilnībām, aicina mainīt pastāvošo kārtību, ja tā ir pretrunā sabiedrības interesēm. Raidījumu vada LTV Ziņu dienesta žurnālists Guntis Bojārs.

programme.title: Es - Alfreds Hičkoks
programme.desc: Alfredu Hičkoku pazīst kā vienu no dižākajiem 20. gadsimta kinorežisoriem, un skatītāji vienmēr nepacietīgi gaida paša režisora sīko lomiņu katrā viņa filmā. Taču viņš ne tikai strādāja kino jomā, bet arī veidoja to! Vienmēr sveicot visu jauno, viņš bija viens no retajiem, kas tik veiksmīgi pārgāja no mēmā uz skaņu kino, tad vienmēr pārsteidza skatītājus ar kaut ko jaunu katrā savā jaunajā filmā, pat mainīja to, kā notiek filmu izrādīšana kinoteātros, un prata veiksmīgi savā labā izmantot televīzijas parādīšanos. Alfreda Hičkoka ietekme bija milzīga, un tā ir jūtama joprojām.

programme.title: Mūžīgā ēna
programme.desc: Policiju pārpludina zvani no cilvēkiem, kuriem šķiet, ka viņi atpazinuši balsi. Vecākie izmeklētāji pieķeras domai, ka slepkava nāk no Anglijas ziemeļiem, jo tā liecina viņa akcents. Visi, kuri nerunā ar šo akcentu, tiek atskaitīti no aizdomās turamajiem. Viens no konstebliem norāda uz Pīteru Satklifu kā iespējamo vainīgo, bet Diks Holands viņu neņem vērā, jo Satklifam ir Jorkšīras akcents. Oldfīlds un Holands dodas pie Olīvas Smeltas, kura neatkāpjas no tā, ka viņas uzbrucējs runāja ar Jorkšīras akcentu, un detektīvi viņai netic. Metropoles policija dod mājienu, ka varbūt Rietumjorkšīrai pienācis laiks lūgt Londonas palīdzību. Viens no detektīviem pamana kļūdu uzšķērdēja vēstulē un apgalvo, ka vēstuli nav rakstījis īstais slepkava. Bet viņa idejas tiek noraidītas. Džeklīnas vecāki raizējas par meitas drošību, jo Līdsā tiek nogalināta studente Barbara Līča, kļūstot par 12. upuri. 1980. gada novembrī tiek nogalināta arī Džeklīna. Viņas studiju biedri sarīko protesta gājienu. Un kāda cita jauna sieviete Olīvija Rīversa iekāpj Pītera Satklifa auto Šefīldā….

programme.desc: Gan mūzikas notikumu tiešraides, gan raidījumi un diskusijas par literatūru, kino, vizuālo un tautas mākslu, gan populāro kultūru, kas attīsta latvisko identitāti.

programme.title: V.I.P. - Veiksme. Intuīcija. Prāts
programme.desc: Pirms diviem mēnešiem noslēdzās 26. ziemas olimpiskās spēles, ko tālāk? Tagad ar nepacietību gaidām vasaras sporta parādi Losandželosā 2028. gadā, kurā, visticamāk, piedalīsies kāds no Uģa Joksta šī vakara viesiem. Komandu kapteiņi: Dāvis Skreivers un Aleksandrs Samoilovs. Dāvis Skreivers - komandas kapteinis, basketbolists. Studējis Latvijas Universitātē Komunikācijas zinātni, bijis augstskolas komandas spēlētājs. Reiz ieguvis duālās karjeras stipendiju par augstiem sasniegumiem sportā -⁠⁠ bijis U18 basketbola izlases spēlētājs un 3x3 U21 izlases spēlētājs. Pērn piedalījās Ķīnā notiekošajā Pasaules kausa izcīņā 3x3 basketbolā U23 vienībām. Toreiz mediji ziņoja, ka Skreivera uzņēmība ļāva latviešiem pieveikt amerikāņus. Francis Lācis - basketbolists, spēlē spēka uzbrucēja pozīcijā. Pēdējos gados pilnībā pievērsies 3x3 basketbolam, spēlējis ASV koledžu un universitāšu sporta klubos, arī Nīderlandē. Bija Latvijas 3x3 basketbola komandas spēlētājs olimpiskajā turnīrā Parīzē. 2025. gadā pārstāvēja Latvijas-Igaunijas basketbola līgas un Latvijas basketbola līgas klubu "Rīgas Zeļļi". Nauris Miezis - basketbolists, startē 3x3 basketbola disciplīnā. Olimpiskās zelta medaļas ieguvējs 2020. gada vasaras olimpiskajās spēlēs Tokijā. Pēdējā laikā profesionālo karjeru saistījis ar Ķīnu un Mongoliju. Bez olimpiskā zelta ir arī zelts un trīs sudrabi Eiropas kausā, sudrabs un bronza Pasaules kausā. Nauris ir arī erudīcijas spēļu veterāns un ģeogrāfijas zinātājs. Aleksandrs Samoilovs - komandas kapteinis. Izglītības un zinātnes ministrijas Sporta departamenta vadītājs, pludmales volejbolists un treneris. Ar iesauku "Karalis Lauva" ("Lion King") ilgstoši bijis līderis Latvijas pludmales volejbolā, 15 gadus startējis pasaules augstākā līmeņa sacensībās. Karjeras laikā viņš spēlējis kopā ar tādiem Latvijas sportistiem kā Jānis Šmēdiņš un Mārtiņš Pļaviņš - abi ir olimpisko medaļu ieguvēji. Kristians Fokerots - pludmales volejbolists. Viens no talantīgākajiem un perspektīvākajiem jaunās paaudzes Latvijas pludmales volejbolistiem. 2024. gadā 19 gadu vecumā kļuva par Eiropas čempionu pārī ar Mārtiņu Plaviņu, savukārt, 2025. gadā pārī ar Gustavu Auziņu kļuva par pasaules čempioniem vecuma grupā līdz 21 gadam. Līva Ēbere - šobrīd Komercskolas skolniece, pludmales volejboliste, Mārtiņa Pļaviņa audzēkne. Volejbola laukumā izceļas ar cīņassparu un labu aizsardzību, personiskās kvalitātēs dominē liela mērķtiecība. Izcīnījusi godalgotas vietas 2024. gada Eiropas čempionātā U22. 2025. gadā pārstāvējusi Latviju gan Eiropas, gan pasaules čempionātos, guvusi augstus rezultātus.

programme.title: Latvijas Sirdsdziesma
programme.desc: Latvijas Sirdsdziesma ir sirsnīgi muzikāls raidījums, kurā tiek atspoguļotas tautā vispopulārākās latviešu mūzikas dzīves norises šī vārda visplašākajā nozīmē.

programme.title: Sporta studija
programme.desc: "Mūsu uzņemtais virziens izsakāms neformālā sauklī "sports sabiedrībai!". Šis virziens tika uzsākts jau iepriekš ar "Tautas sporta" sižetu sērijām un sporta laukumu kampaņām. Turpmāk LTV Tautas sporta sižeti būs tradicionāla "Sporta studijas" sastāvdaļa. "Sporta Studiju" vadīs rūdītie sporta žurnālisti Dāvids Ernštreits un Reinis Ošenieks, kā arī jaunās sporta žurnālistikas zvaigznes Andris Auziņš, Matīss Timofejevs un Raimonds Gekišs. "Sporta studijas" aktualitātēm sekojiet https://www.facebook.com/LTVSportaStudija

programme.title: Province
programme.desc: Jura Pumpiņa dzimtā puse ir Balgale. Taču viņam nebija lemts tur uzaugt, jo viņš bija bērns vienā no tām ģimenēm, kuras izsūtīja 1949. gadā. Pēc atgriešanās viņiem vairs nebija savu tēva māju, jo tur jau dzīvoja sveši ļaudis, kolhoznieki. No Sibīrijas Jurim palika krievu valoda, jo latviešu mēle bija jāmācās gandrīz no jauna, un runas defekts - vecāko brāli bērnībā izsūtījumā sabadīja bullis, viņš sāka raustīt valodu, un Jurim, brāli atdarinot, tas pielipa. Sešdesmitajos un septiņdesmitajos gados Juris no darbiem brīvajā laikā iesaistījās leģendārajā "Rīgas pantomīmā", piedzīvojot šī amatierkolektīva ziedu laikus. Un deviņdesmito sākumā tēva mājas beidzot tika atgūtas. Juris joprojām nav pārdevis ne pēdu savas senču zemes - nepārdot ir viņa goda lieta. Tāpat kā goda lieta ir arī būt par zvaniķi Balgales baznīcā un par tiesnesi novusa mačos.

programme.title: Mani hiti
programme.desc: "MyHits TV" atskaņo gan pašmāju, gan ārzemju labākos un karstākos šībrīža hitus – rūpīgi atlasīti TOP 40 formāta ritmi jūsu ekrānā!

programme.title: The Truth Behind
programme.desc: Crystal Skulls - mysterious artefacts found around the world that have captured the imagination of new age enthusiasts and esteemed academics alike. One skull in particular has long been the source of controversy and intrigue. The Truth Behind Crystal Skulls looks specifically at the provenance of the Mitchell-Hedges Crystal Skull, claimed to have been discovered in Belize in the early 20th Century. The program answers the questions that continue to mystify its proponents. Is it a contemporary object of art? Is it an ancient Mayan artefact dating to over 3000 years ago? This adventurous documentary finds the answers by delving in to the murky past of the skull and taking us on a journey through the streets of Beijing, the jungle of Belize and the cities of Washington DC and London UK to discover the truth.

programme.title: The Truth Behind
programme.desc: UFOs. Everyones heard about them - but what are they exactly? The Truth Behind travels to the unofficial UFO capital of the world to investigate. Charting the rise of UFO sightings from the 1940s to the present day, the investigation examines the conspiracy theories, conducts a stakeout in the desert, looks into a recent sighting, and takes a field trip to a crash site in Nevada might unearth some clues. Well hear the experiences of a man whos flown in a real flying saucer and has got the footage to prove it. All to find the Truth Behind UFOs.

programme.title: Is It Real?
programme.desc: Is It Real? sorts the facts from fiction in modern-day myths about supernatural phenomena. The show explores some of the more common myths such as crop circles and ghosts, as well as some of the far out myths like spontaneous human combustion. The series looked at these topics from a skeptical point of view, going at them with the attitude of, "Oh yeah? Then prove it." Frequently, the people making the more outrageous claims could not.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: Port Protection is home to the few who have left behind normal society and chosen a different life in a remote Alaskan community, where survival of the individuals and community cannot sustain without the other. The stakes are high. The land is rugged and unforgiving and the seas which surround Port Protection are cold and merciless. With risk comes a reward more profound than mere survival: a world of beauty and freedom with the security of community and without the constraints of bureaucracy. In Port Protection there are no clear roads to survival, inhabitants must carve one themselves.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: Port Protection is home to the few who have left behind normal society and chosen a different life in a remote Alaskan community, where survival of the individuals and community cannot sustain without the other. The stakes are high. The land is rugged and unforgiving and the seas which surround Port Protection are cold and merciless. With risk comes a reward more profound than mere survival: a world of beauty and freedom with the security of community and without the constraints of bureaucracy. In Port Protection there are no clear roads to survival, inhabitants must carve one themselves.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of historys most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report
programme.desc: Spatial disorientation is one of the leading causes of all air accidents. Even the most experienced pilots are susceptible to its subtle yet deadly effects. A confused John F. Kennedy Jr. disappears on the way to Marthas Vineyard. High over the Red Sea, a captain loses his bearings and crashes his passenger jet. And, off the coast of Indonesia, pilots fly their Boeing 737 into a violent storm and end up on the ocean floor.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Behind each bag of chips, can of beer, candy bar, or loaf of bread, lies a mega-industrial production line that brings each product to the masses. Introducing Food Factory, a mesmerizing peek behind the scenes of the weird and wonderful processes that produce everyones favorite foods. From raw materials to finished products, Food Factory reveals in awe-inspiring detail how mass-produced favorites are really made. Put on a hardhat and get ready to meet the food!

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Behind each bag of chips, can of beer, candy bar, or loaf of bread, lies a mega-industrial production line that brings each product to the masses. Introducing Food Factory, a mesmerizing peek behind the scenes of the weird and wonderful processes that produce everyones favorite foods. From raw materials to finished products, Food Factory reveals in awe-inspiring detail how mass-produced favorites are really made. Put on a hardhat and get ready to meet the food!

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: From the earliest colonization attempts to now, hurricanes have wreaked havoc along the North American coast. Exploring the wreckage reveals surprising truths about the continents history. Through the remnants of a 16th century Spanish galleon, a mysterious pile of revolutionary era cannons, and hundreds of submerged New York subway cars, scientists are uncovering how hurricanes have shaped Americas past - and how they might impact its future.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: When Mt. Vesuvius erupted 2000 years ago, it buried the towns of Pompeii and Herculaneum. Today new discoveries are revealing a detailed timeline of the final heart-breaking moments of the citizens trapped in its aftermath. Archaeologists are finding that many of those who didnt survive belong to a previously hidden world of enslaved peoples, a forgotten class of ordinary people vital to ancient Roman society.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Car SOS is back for a sixth series with parts blagging petrolhead Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend breathing life into classic cars for unsuspecting owners. This series yet another array of iconic cars including a 1990s Lancia Delta Integrale, a 60s Citroen DS, an 80s Peugeot 205 Rally car and a 1950s MGA. Special guests this series include actor James Nesbitt and Monte Carlo legend Paddy Hopkirk.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz take on 63 year old Kels 1962 Triumph TR4. Kel bought his beloved British roadster back in the 1970s and it became the car of his youth, he simply couldnt be parted from it - even when it finally gave up the ghost and ended up in storage - it was never far from his thoughts. His planned restoration sadly ground to a halt when a series of family tragedies and a brutal stroke that robbed him of most of his vision - meant that any plans to get his car back on the road were dashed. Tim and Fuzz steal the car away but quickly realise that theyve taken on one of the biggest jobs in Car SOS history.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz travel to Northern Ireland to take on a 1972 Generation 1 Toyota Celica a rare Japanese coupe that has seen better days. The cars owner is 50 year old Celica obsessive Noel who bought the car with a plan to restore it and use it as his daily driver. However Noels whole life took a turn for the worse when he suffered a series of spinal injuries that lost him his job, his home and put his dream car restoration on hold for good.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz take on the restoration of a lightweight British pocket rocket , a 1997 Lotus Elise. The cars owner, 44 year old former print manager Sarah, had been planning to get the car back on the road with the help of her dad Phil until double tragedy struck - he fell victim to incurable bowel cancer then sadly Sarah herself was also diagnosed with cancer. The cars restoration was put on hold. Mother Jenny wrote in to Car SOS hoping to bring back her daughters much needed smile.

programme.title: Disaster Autopsy
programme.desc: Space shuttle Columbia, the Deepwater Horizon oil rig, and the Fukushima Daiichi nuclear power plant are three major disasters linked to engineering and design flaws. Now, using the latest research and evidence along with 3D reconstructions, experts rewind the day of each disaster, dissect the chain of events, and pinpoint the warnings and design choices that turned failures into catastrophes. What turned Columbias return into a disaster? Why didnt the oil rigs final defenses hold? And how did a massive wave defeat emergency backups?

programme.title: Disaster Autopsy
programme.desc: A construction crane in the heart of New York City, Italys iconic Morandi Bridge, and a multistory department store in Korea — three major disasters linked to engineering errors. Now, using the latest research and evidence along with 3D reconstructions, experts rewind the day of each disaster, dissect the chain of events, and pinpoint the warnings and design flaws that spiraled into structural collapse. How does a series of oversights, design flaws, and negligent decisions lead to deadly catastrophes?

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: King Herod is reviled as one of the most evil characters in the Bible, responsible for the horrific "massacre of the innocents" in his efforts to kill the infant Jesus Christ. But later historians coin him "Herod the Great." Now, immersive CGI and new archaeological discoveries—on land and deep underwater—reveal the truth about this Biblical villain.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: In Israel, archaeologists investigate the truth behind one of the greatest discoveries in history: the Dead Sea Scrolls. Found in 1947 deep in the Judean desert, this remarkable haul of 2,000-year-old manuscripts includes the oldest copies of the biblical texts ever found. But no one knows who wrote them or why they were hidden. In this episode, investigators combine traditional excavations with revolutionary analytical technologies to uncover new evidence that could help solve these mysteries. Cutting-edge imaging techniques reveal hidden clues in the scrolls — which could help identify the authors — while archaeological discoveries in Jerusalem paint a picture of a brutal, destructive event that would tear apart the ancient Jewish world around the time the scrolls were hidden.

programme.title: Airport Security: To Catch a Smuggler Latin America Compilation
programme.desc: Drug-trafficking is risky business. In Airport Security Colombia and Peru, suspects try to evade detection. A couple traveling to Punta Cana is not what they seem. The man risked it all for money. A woman carrying cocaine on her body did it to start a business and help her family. A first-time carrier hiding cocaine in traditional handicraft mats gambles and loses. A Syrian man uses false documents twice, hoping to reunite with family in Europe.

programme.title: Airport Security: To Catch a Smuggler Latin America Compilation
programme.desc: Clueless carriers, and people betrayed. Officials from Airport Security Colombia and Peru must remain vigilant. A womans boyfriend asks her to carry bottles. She has no idea they contain liquid cocaine. A man with cocaine in his suitcase claims his son-in-law is responsible. A US woman may have been tricked into drug-trafficking. A construction worker is given a bag with cocaine. Of two Ukrainian friends, one claims to have tricked the other.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Flight: TAM Airlines Flight 402; Fokker 100; October 31st, 1996. Just seconds after lifting off from Congonhas airport in Sao Paulo, Brazil, TAM Airlines flight 402 slams into a residential neighborhood and bursts into flames killing all 95 people on board. Investigators from the Brazilian Air Force join forces with the U.S. National Transportation Safety Board to uncover a series of events that led to a failure so rare, it seemed impossible.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Disaster Autopsy
programme.desc: Space shuttle Columbia, the Deepwater Horizon oil rig, and the Fukushima Daiichi nuclear power plant are three major disasters linked to engineering and design flaws. Now, using the latest research and evidence along with 3D reconstructions, experts rewind the day of each disaster, dissect the chain of events, and pinpoint the warnings and design choices that turned failures into catastrophes. What turned Columbias return into a disaster? Why didnt the oil rigs final defenses hold? And how did a massive wave defeat emergency backups?

programme.title: Disaster Autopsy
programme.desc: A construction crane in the heart of New York City, Italys iconic Morandi Bridge, and a multistory department store in Korea — three major disasters linked to engineering errors. Now, using the latest research and evidence along with 3D reconstructions, experts rewind the day of each disaster, dissect the chain of events, and pinpoint the warnings and design flaws that spiraled into structural collapse. How does a series of oversights, design flaws, and negligent decisions lead to deadly catastrophes?

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, well dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, well dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur.

programme.title: Seconds from Disaster
programme.desc: The series investigates historically relevant human-made and natural disasters from the last century. Each episode is dedicated to a particular gruesome accident, every minute of which is thoroughly analyzed and studied in order to present the reasons for its occurrence and circumstances of it. The program uses re-enactments, interviews with witnesses and survivors, and CGI to show the viewers how it happened in reality. All this is done to draw viewers attention to these issues so that we make sure they wont happen again in the future.

programme.title: Chernobyl: Inside the Meltdown
programme.desc: At 1.23AM on April 26th,1986 a massive explosion rips through reactor number four at Chernobyl nuclear power plant in the Soviet Ukraine. A safety test has triggered the worst nuclear accident in history, releasing 400 times more radiation into the atmosphere than the Hiroshima bomb. While control room operators reel in shock, the nuclear plants firefighters battle the blaze amidst lethal levels of radiation. Just 3km away in the local town of Pripyat, Communist party officials encourage life to go on as normal. Children go to school and couples get married while radiation rains down on them. Meanwhile a giant radioactive cloud starts to circle the globe. Episode 1 follows the first 24-hours of the disaster, with first-hand accounts from people desperately trying to make sense of an accident no one thought could ever happen.

programme.title: Chernobyl: Inside the Meltdown
programme.desc: On 28th April, fire still rages in whats left of reactor number 4. Helicopter crews trying to put it out are bombarded by massive doses of radiation. Soviet authorities finally order the evacuation of local residents, and 50,000 people are forced to leave their homes. They are told to take enough for 3 days, but they will never come back. Frontline firefighters suffering acute radiation burns are locked in wards controlled by the KGB. Many will die within days. In Sweden high levels of radiation alert the rest of the world to a radioactive cloud sweeping across Europe - evidence of a massive nuclear accident in the USSR. But the Soviet authorities remain silent. Episode Two charts the first two weeks after the meltdown, revealing the human cost of the accident, and the Soviet efforts to conceal the true scale of the disaster.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue: Highway Havoc!
programme.desc: Journey through the unforgiving and inhospitable climate of Norways frozen mountains with the elite rescue crews who come to the aid of stranded travellers and battle round-the-clock to maintain access to vital road links. With sudden changes in the weather, from torrential rain to snow blizzards and sudden temperature changes, the teams have their work cut out for them. Risking life and limb in some of Europes harshest conditions, it takes a special breed of men and women to overcome the many challenges thay face on a daily basis. As the roads turn into icy bobsleigh tracks, haulage container vehicles and private cars and vans all get themselves into difficulties and need to be rescued by our road warrior heroes.

programme.title: Airport Security: To Catch a Smuggler Latin America Compilation
programme.desc: Drug-trafficking is risky business. In Airport Security Colombia and Peru, suspects try to evade detection. A couple traveling to Punta Cana is not what they seem. The man risked it all for money. A woman carrying cocaine on her body did it to start a business and help her family. A first-time carrier hiding cocaine in traditional handicraft mats gambles and loses. A Syrian man uses false documents twice, hoping to reunite with family in Europe.

programme.title: Airport Security: To Catch a Smuggler Latin America Compilation
programme.desc: Clueless carriers, and people betrayed. Officials from Airport Security Colombia and Peru must remain vigilant. A womans boyfriend asks her to carry bottles. She has no idea they contain liquid cocaine. A man with cocaine in his suitcase claims his son-in-law is responsible. A US woman may have been tricked into drug-trafficking. A construction worker is given a bag with cocaine. Of two Ukrainian friends, one claims to have tricked the other.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: The U.S. Coast Guard stops smugglers with over 13,000 kilos of cocaine at sea and transfers custody to Homeland Security Investigations for prosecution. At Dulles International Airport, near the nations capital, U.S. Customs and Border Protection officers uncover weapons heading outbound during checks for unreported currency. In El Paso, CBP Agricultural Specialists inspect live and deceased animals to protect the U.S. from foreign diseases, like avian flu.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Air and Marine Operations in St. Thomas arrest a suspected smuggler and chase a vessel fleeing into British Virgin Island waters. U.S. Customs and Border Protection busts a mother-daughter duo smuggling large amounts of marijuana through Miami International Airport to the Caribbean. In El Paso, alerts from the K9 at the Sierra Blanca checkpoint lead U.S. Border Patrol agents to the discovery of drugs and guns in multiple vehicles.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: The volatile climate of Southeast Alaska challenges Port Protections residents who live on the edge of society. Gary battles father time while securing needed resources. Curly pushes through in the wake of a tragic loss. Mary faces her fears to survive in extreme conditions. Sam fights to preserve the only lifestyle hes ever known. Squibb looks to improve upon his surroundings. And Stuart deals with past injuries as he battles the elements.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: The volatile climate of Southeast Alaska challenges Port Protections residents who live on the edge of society. Gary battles father time while securing needed resources. Curly pushes through in the wake of a tragic loss. Mary faces her fears to survive in extreme conditions. Sam fights to preserve the only lifestyle hes ever known. Squibb looks to improve upon his surroundings. And Stuart deals with past injuries as he battles the elements.

programme.title: Last of the Giants
programme.desc: Its a battle for survival when a massive piraiba pulls the team down a raging river before they can sample it. Potential disaster greets them at every turn, and the guys are forced to change strategies. Merciless rapids, hidden stingrays, motor failures, lightning strikes, black piranhas and massive falling trees are just some of the dangers the crew must overcome in their quest to sample a giant piraiba for their research. And with a mysterious fish on his line, Cyril gets much more than he bargained for, in a truly dangerous battle.

programme.title: Last of the Giants
programme.desc: Their guides abandon the crew in a hostile area and they must now trek on foot into uncharted territory that exposes them to true danger when they cross stingray-infested rapids, run into an ominous poachers camp and face down armed, angry hunters. Their scientific research is at stake, and the guys are forced deeper into the jungle than ever before to find the 200-pound giant piraiba they need to sample. But with a colossal fish finally on his line, Cyril is in for the fight of his life when he gets dragged into a river full of giant black piranhas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report
programme.desc: With airplane travel becoming increasingly popular in a shrinking world and millions of passengers journeying this way every day, it is helpful to be aware of the potentail dangers involved. This show presents remarkable stories of some of the most catastrophic accidents in aviation history and investigates the causes of the accidents, what effect they had on the industry and the steps taken to ensure that they dont happen in the future. Each stand-alone episode features compelling re-enactments, expert analysis and interviews with those involved. The explanations for the accidents range from the explosive power of decompression to problems with autopilots and computerised control systems to air traffic control errors.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: At nearly 100-years-old, White Castle is the oldest burger chain in America, and since 1986, the company has sold more than three billion of its frozen cheeseburger sliders. Red Gold Salsa is made from tomatoes grown on more than 50 farms in several states, and it takes three kinds of chilies to give the popular condiment its signature zing. A family business since 1892, Ashers Chocolates in Pennsylvania has perfected the art of making rich and fruity chocolate-covered Cordial Cherries.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Nicknamed the king of beers, Budweisers St. Louis brewery remains true to its roots, and still uses the very same yeast that first launched the brand back in 1876. Meet the inventor and the cryogenic processor behind Dippin Dots--the fruit-flavor ice cream beads that literally chill out in a bath of liquid nitrogen. If carrot cake is your thing, youll go bananas for Ne-Mos Escondido, California headquarters where 80,000 cakes are baked and iced daily.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: The Amber Room is one of the worlds most valuable lost art treasures. Stolen by the Nazis and kept in a castle on the Baltic coast, it vanished in the brutal last months of the war. Today the new discovery of a shipwreck holding a large secret cargo leads explorers to the heart of the mystery, and reveals a forgotten tragedy of 1945: the largest sea evacuation in history, dwarfing Dunkirk in size.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns have threatened ships and mariners for centuries. The perfect storm?. towering walls of water, powerful winds and churning seas can overwhelm any ship. What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And whats the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Made in a Day
programme.desc: Theres been a revolution in manufacturing and international logistics in the last 10 years. What used to take a month to make and deliver now takes just a day and nowhere is this more evident than in the USA - an economic powerhouse at the heart of the global economy. In this brand-new series, we unveil the incredible scale and human ingenuity behind the manufacture and transportation of some of Americas biggest, global brands.

programme.title: Made in a Day
programme.desc: Theres been a revolution in manufacturing and international logistics in the last 10 years. What used to take a month to make and deliver now takes just a day and nowhere is this more evident than in the USA - an economic powerhouse at the heart of the global economy. In this brand-new series, we unveil the incredible scale and human ingenuity behind the manufacture and transportation of some of Americas biggest, global brands.

programme.title: Made in a Day
programme.desc: Theres been a revolution in manufacturing and international logistics in the last 10 years. What used to take a month to make and deliver now takes just a day and nowhere is this more evident than in the USA - an economic powerhouse at the heart of the global economy. In this brand-new series, we unveil the incredible scale and human ingenuity behind the manufacture and transportation of some of Americas biggest, global brands.

programme.title: Challenger Disaster: Lost Tapes
programme.desc: The Challenger Disaster Tapes follows the story of the Space Shuttle Challenger and its crew, specifically Christa Mcauliffe, the first civilian to be launched into space. Mcauliffe was a teacher from Concord, N.H., She was chosen from thousands of applicants to expand the understanding of the nations school children about space and the next generation of interplanetary travel. But her dreams - and those of NASA - were tragically cut shot when the Challenger exploded just after liftoff in front of a live television audience. The events of the days leading up to the disaster are detailed in this unique film, which uses no narration and no interviews. Instead the story is told solely with reports of journalists covering the story, extensive recordings from the NASA team and interviews with Mcauliffe and others who were part of this one-off-a-kind mission. Using rarely seen images and audio recordings, The Challenger Disaster Tapes takes viewers behind the scenes of this compelling and historic story in a way never before seen.

programme.title: Ghost of the Minerva
programme.desc: January 28th 1968: the submarine La Minerve disappeared into the waters of the Mediterranean. In spite of the extensive search organized by the French Navy, the craft and its 52 crew members were never found, thus laying the ground for one of the greatest mysteries in French naval history. Summer of 2019: more than a half century later, the search resumes and turns out to be the largest underwater investigation ever carried out by the French forces. Through archival and 3D images, alongside light re-enactments, this documentary narrates the incredible adventure of past and present searches, showing elements of the unfinished investigation of 1969 and the perseverance of the commanders son, Herve Faure. Le Fantôme des Abysses also features key moments such as the first days of the investigation of Ifremer, the search conducted by the Seabed Cosntructors team, and finally the discovery of the wreck.

programme.title: AZF: French Factory Explosion
programme.desc: 21 September 2001, 10h17. In the AZF factory, in Toulouse, France, a storage of around 300 tons ammonium nitrate exploded, injuring thousands and killing 31 people. 20 years later, never seen before footage and unpublished interviews show the minute by minute of this industrial disaster, the biggest in French history since WWII.

programme.desc: A construction crane in the heart of New York City, Italys iconic Morandi Bridge, and a multistory department store in Korea — three major disasters linked to engineering errors. Episode Two charts the first two weeks after the meltdown, revealing the human cost of the accident, and the Soviet efforts to conceal the true scale of the disaster.

programme.title: Gladiators: Warriors of the Ancient World
programme.desc: 75 BCE, Spartacus, a soldier enslaved by Rome and forced into gladiatorial combat leads fellow gladiators in a daring escape. Disaffected slaves join him, sparking a massive rebellion that defeats Roman legions. His story shows how closely linked gladiators were to the politics of the Roman Republic. Though hes ultimately defeated, his legacy lives on as a symbol of freedom.

programme.title: Gladiators: Warriors of the Ancient World
programme.desc: Spiculus, Neros favourite gladiator, becomes a superstar in Romes brutal arenas. Rewarded with wealth and privilege, he fights for glory as Nero uses lavish games to display his power. After the Fire of 64 CE, Neros spectacles grow grander. When his reign finally collapses, Nero calls for Spiculus to kill him - but dies by his own hand. Spiculuss fate remains a mystery, his legend enduring.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: In Californias Mojave Desert, Virgin Galactic test pilots are at the controls of a revolutionary aircraft designed for sub-orbital flight. But as the spaceship accelerates toward the outer reaches of Earths atmosphere, approaching the speed of sound, it breaks apart and falls from the sky. With the future of commercial space travel hanging in the balance, its up to investigators to figure out what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Korean Air Flight 6316 is en route to Seoul with a load of non-hazardous cargo. But shortly after takeoff, the pilots struggle to navigate the skies above Shanghai. The controller notices the plane isnt climbing to its assigned altitude. And within minutes, the MD-11F disappears from radar altogether and slams into a residential neighborhood. The massive impact registers the equivalent of a 1.6-magnitude earthquake, destroys the flight data recorder, and claims the lives of five civilians and the three-man crew. Investigators from China, South Korea, and the US join forces, and are soon able to rule out both mechanical issues and sabotage. Its only when they reconstruct the flight in a simulator that the mystery begins to unravel—and they come to a startling realization.

programme.title: Notre Dame: Race Against the Inferno
programme.desc: On 15th April 2019, during Holy Monday Mass, the worlds most famous cathedral caught fire. Notre-Dame de Paris was ablaze in minutes, as an epic battle unfolded for heroic French firefighters. Under the gaze of the worlds media, they fought the inferno for more than 15 hours. Exclusive footage and interviews bring vividly to life the moment-by-moment courage of the Paris fire and police services, as they put their lives on the line to save this historic building.

programme.title: AZF: French Factory Explosion
programme.desc: 21 September 2001, 10h17. In the AZF factory, in Toulouse, France, a storage of around 300 tons ammonium nitrate exploded, injuring thousands and killing 31 people. 20 years later, never seen before footage and unpublished interviews show the minute by minute of this industrial disaster, the biggest in French history since WWII.

programme.title: Seconds from Disaster
programme.desc: In March 2011, as Japan reels from the most powerful earthquake in its history, a 14 metre-high tsunami surges over the Fukushima Dai-ichi nuclear power plant, knocking out its power supply and essential cooling systems. With the plant blacked out, engineers face nuclear meltdown. The reactors begin to overheat leading to two huge explosions that tear the plant apart and dispersing radiation. As Japan faces the worst nuclear emergency since Chernobyl, an international nuclear expert will investigate exactly what happed at Fukushima and see what, if anything, could have been done to prevent it.

programme.title: Chernobyl: Inside the Meltdown
programme.desc: At 1.23AM on April 26th,1986 a massive explosion rips through reactor number four at Chernobyl nuclear power plant in the Soviet Ukraine. A safety test has triggered the worst nuclear accident in history, releasing 400 times more radiation into the atmosphere than the Hiroshima bomb. While control room operators reel in shock, the nuclear plants firefighters battle the blaze amidst lethal levels of radiation. Just 3km away in the local town of Pripyat, Communist party officials encourage life to go on as normal. Children go to school and couples get married while radiation rains down on them. Meanwhile a giant radioactive cloud starts to circle the globe. Episode 1 follows the first 24-hours of the disaster, with first-hand accounts from people desperately trying to make sense of an accident no one thought could ever happen.

programme.title: Chernobyl: Inside the Meltdown
programme.desc: On 28th April, fire still rages in whats left of reactor number 4. Helicopter crews trying to put it out are bombarded by massive doses of radiation. Soviet authorities finally order the evacuation of local residents, and 50,000 people are forced to leave their homes. They are told to take enough for 3 days, but they will never come back. Frontline firefighters suffering acute radiation burns are locked in wards controlled by the KGB. Many will die within days. In Sweden high levels of radiation alert the rest of the world to a radioactive cloud sweeping across Europe - evidence of a massive nuclear accident in the USSR. But the Soviet authorities remain silent. Episode Two charts the first two weeks after the meltdown, revealing the human cost of the accident, and the Soviet efforts to conceal the true scale of the disaster.

programme.title: Chernobyl: Inside the Meltdown
programme.desc: Two weeks after the explosion, Soviet authorities race to stop a molten nuclear core from poisoning the water table, and clear deadly radioactive fallout across a 30km exclusion zone. Through the summer of 1986, hundreds of thousands of conscripts and volunteers answer the governments call, to brave lethal radiation levels and build a giant concrete sarcophagus around the destroyed reactor. Meanwhile in Vienna, after months of speculation, the worlds nuclear experts gather to hear the Soviet account of what caused the catastrophe. Is Gorbachevs promise of Glasnost finally revealing the truth from behind the Iron Curtain? Or could this be the Soviets biggest cover up yet? Episode Three uncovers the extraordinary battle to build the most perilous construction project in history told by those who those who were there 40 years ago.

programme.title: Chernobyl: Inside the Meltdown
programme.desc: Over a year after the accident, plant operators accused of causing the catastrophe face a Soviet show trial. Inside the power plant, nearly 200 tonnes of lethally radioactive nuclear fuel has gone missing. Scientists hunt for it deep inside the perilous reactor core. As the USSR collapses, an independent investigation searches for evidence of what happened the night of the meltdown, uncovering classified documents that reveal what really caused the explosion, and powerful evidence for a Soviet cover up. Chernobyls toxic legacy continues right up to the present-day war in Ukraine, when the nuclear exclusion zone turns into a war zone, and the power plant itself comes under attack, raising fears of another nuclear disaster. Episode four reveals how 40-years on, the Chernobyl catastrophe is more relevant than ever.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: When a salmon truck crashes into a ditch, it kicks off a night of havoc for Thord. While Thord and Bjoern attempt to rescue the truck and its load of valuable salmon, Thord must send rookie Domenic on a solo mission to control a chaotic situation, on a notorious accident black-spot. With Thords capacity pushed to the limit, he then dispatches Terje and Ørjan to rescue a bus thats crashed into a ditch. When Terje makes a critical mistake, it only makes matters worse.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: When wild weather and traffic convoys cause carnage, Thord races against time to rescue stranded drivers. In the North, Ole Henrik takes the companys brand new tow-truck on its first mission. The task is to rescue a truck that crashed deep into a snow covered ditch, then flipped 90 degrees onto its side. Ole Henriks eager to put the new flagship rescue truck to the test, to see if its worth the big investment.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: The Devils Climb
programme.desc: Alex Honnold and Tommy Caldwell are two of the greatest rock climbers of all time - and best friends. Together, they set off on an epic adventure cycling 2,500 miles enroute to a daring climb of The Devils Thumb, a legendary 9,000-foot Alaskan peak surrounded by old-growth rainforest. Tommy is recovering from a career-threatening injury making the expeditions success uncertain.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: Port Protection is home to the few who have left behind normal society and chosen a different life in a remote Alaskan community, where survival of the individuals and community cannot sustain without the other. The stakes are high. The land is rugged and unforgiving and the seas which surround Port Protection are cold and merciless. With risk comes a reward more profound than mere survival: a world of beauty and freedom with the security of community and without the constraints of bureaucracy. In Port Protection there are no clear roads to survival, inhabitants must carve one themselves.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: Port Protection is home to the few who have left behind normal society and chosen a different life in a remote Alaskan community, where survival of the individuals and community cannot sustain without the other. The stakes are high. The land is rugged and unforgiving and the seas which surround Port Protection are cold and merciless. With risk comes a reward more profound than mere survival: a world of beauty and freedom with the security of community and without the constraints of bureaucracy. Its only when they reconstruct the flight in a simulator that the mystery begins to unravel—and they come to a startling realization.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Twenty minutes after taking off from Taipei, Taiwan a China Airlines 747 suddenly disappears from radar. A massive rescue mission is launched, ut all 225 passengers and crew are dead. After ruling out both a bomb and a gas tank explosion, investigators are stumped. They examine hundreds of pieces of wreckage until they discover a single piece of the hull that solves the riddle. Tragically, the crash of Flight 611 began with a problem that began twenty-two years earlier.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Extraordinary Australia
programme.desc: From lush ancient rainforests to wet grassland and dry eucalyptus forest, Australias diverse habitats are home to an array of weird and wonderful creatures found nowhere else on the planet. From the bizarre anatomy of the platypus to the savage screams of Tasmanian devils, the creatures of Australia rely on extraordinary adaptations to survive in continents vast and diverse habitats.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: In an action packed episode of Animal Fight Club we reveal what happens when the Animal Kingdoms most vicious species fight tooth and claw in the deadliest of conflicts. With exclusive user generated content and footage from top wildlife filmmakers, this episode sheds new light on the fiercest fights Mother Nature has to offer, proving that its not always the animal you expect that ends up coming out on top …

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: Documentary series featuring fearsome fights between the biggest and the baddest animals on planet. Watch the animals fighting for their food, territory, rights and life. Follow the drama and adrenaline of the toughest and fearcest fights in savannah, jungles and water. It is an ultimate survival with no rules whatsoever. Uncover the extraordinary motivations and strategies used by the animal world.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: "Animal Fight Club: Power Struggles" reveals how the even the most epic battles can be won or lost in a split second. In the world of wild animal fights, nothing is ever certain. Whether an animal is fighting for food, shelter or for survival itself, there are no guarantees. Sometimes even strength of numbers is not enough. In this episode we see a female leopard fight a bigger male for her lunch and her life, discover the complex competition amongst the worlds largest Great Apes and see how a Nile Monitor Lizard can turn its tail into a show stopping weapon.

programme.title: Australias Land of the Ancients
programme.desc: Australias Land of the Ancients explores the unique and ancient landscape of northeastern Australia, the most biodiverse region on the continent. From Crocodiles lying in wait for fish and hunting feral pigs to caring marsupial mothers of the far north, the film highlights some of the incredible species as they struggle to survive in their harsh environment amid a changing landscape.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: In an action packed episode of Animal Fight Club we reveal what happens when the Animal Kingdoms most vicious species fight tooth and claw in the deadliest of conflicts. With exclusive user generated content and footage from top wildlife filmmakers, this episode sheds new light on the fiercest fights Mother Nature has to offer, proving that its not always the animal you expect that ends up coming out on top …

In this episode we see a female leopard fight a bigger male for her lunch and her life, discover the complex competition amongst the worlds largest Great Apes and see how a Nile Monitor Lizard can turn its tail into a show stopping weapon.

programme.title: Europes Wild Marvels
programme.desc: With leopards in its mountains, blue whales off its coasts, and foxes roaming its city centres, Europe is a continent full of wild surprises. From the frozen glaciers of Iceland to the lush islands of the Azores, and from the rugged peaks of the Caucasus to the metropolis of London, the first episode in this stunning series highlights Europes astonishing diversity, all shot with breath-taking brio and the latest technology to reveal the continent and its animals in all its breath-taking glory.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Its summer in Michigan, which means time to bale some hay! Its a grueling process, but Dr. Pol, Charles, and Ben manage to mow their hayfield, which is the first step in baling. But a surprise rainstorm could ruin this years hay haul. They hope for sun, so their crop doesnt spoil before they can bale. Meanwhile, the Pols bring in their next animal to the farm - an emu!

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Its the county fair season! The Pols plan to get at least two cows and six sheep at the auction, but they have a lot to do before that can happen. First up, they must install a new perimeter fence. Charles and Ben think they are off to a good start, but when Dr. Pol points out how sneaky sheep can be, their workload doubles. Meanwhile, Beth is hoping for a goat at the small animal auction.

programme.title: Secrets of the Penguins
programme.desc: The emperors are the largest and strongest of all penguins, living in the coldest, most extreme place on Earth. National Geographic Explorer Bertie Gregory embeds with an Antarctic colony and encounters social skills never filmed before. As the planet rapidly warms, he discovers bonds forged from birth between family, friends and strangers are the difference between life and death.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: South America is a land of extremes. Many hundred thousand square miles of forests, grasslands and mountains. Existing here is a daunting proposition, and some well-known animals have adapted by growing large or very small, each strategy maximizing their chance of survival.

programme.title: Europes Wild Marvels
programme.desc: With leopards in its mountains, blue whales off its coasts, and foxes roaming its city centres, Europe is a continent full of wild surprises. From the frozen glaciers of Iceland to the lush islands of the Azores, and from the rugged peaks of the Caucasus to the metropolis of London, the first episode in this stunning series highlights Europes astonishing diversity, all shot with breath-taking brio and the latest technology to reveal the continent and its animals in all its breath-taking glory.
